one_line: Turns a metastasis biology hypothesis into a prioritized target-and-CRISPR-perturbation package with a traceable rationale and design-risk review.
status_of_document: PRODUCT TRUTH CONTRACT (RUO). Structured knowledge artifact anchored to the CrisPRO KB (Qdrant collection crispro_kb_v3 + Neo4j graph). Not marketing copy; not a page. Every claim carries an evidence receipt.
shared_intelligence_layer_note: Interception is a product SURFACE over the shared CrisPRO biology-intelligence layer (variant interpretation, tumor vectors, pathway/MoA, resistance, synthetic lethality, metastatic mission). It is NOT a standalone engine and must not be reduced to Target Lock alone.

decision.text: Which metastasis target and CRISPR perturbation should enter the next validation experiment, for which step of the metastatic cascade, and with what design-risk profile?

problem.text: Metastasis programs start from a broad, ambiguous target universe. Teams cannot cheaply decide what to test first, for which metastatic step, with which perturbation design, and with which biological evidence. Wet-lab capacity is finite and mis-prioritization is expensive.

input.text: A metastatic biology question (disease + metastatic step of interest) and a candidate target universe (gene list / variants). Optionally a specific gene to score.

workflow_plain_language.text: CrisPRO maps the metastatic-step hypothesis, curates/loads a target universe, runs Target-Lock scoring to prioritize genuine metastasis drivers, reads Evo2 sequence/variant signals, generates CRISPR guide candidates, applies off-target design-risk scoring, checks mission fit, and produces an AlphaFold3 structural receipt under study-defined gates. It ends with an experiment-handoff package and a wet-lab validation roadmap.

output.text: A ranked target report with per-model evidence contributions and uncertainty; a ranked CRISPR guide/spacer design package with off-target risk records; a structural modeling receipt with gate result; and an experiment-handoff + validation-design roadmap.

proof_and_limits.text: RESEARCH USE ONLY. Target-Lock reports a self-labeled AUROC 0.976±0.035 and holdout AUPRC 0.790 on a 38-gene panel — these are INTERNAL-CONSISTENCY metrics, not independent clinical validation. The MSK-MET AUROC 0.689 is a PROHIBITED/fabricated external-validation claim and must never be shipped. Enformer is GATED OFF in production; only AF3 model 0 was reported; multiple stress tests are incomplete; external clinical-cohort validation has NOT been done. AF3 'pass' is a structural-confidence gate, NOT experimental validation. CEACAM5 is NOT in the 38-gene panel (no Target-Lock run). GBM ZEB1 is PERMANENTLY CLOSED (not an escape marker).

engagement.text: A first partner engagement is scoped as one of three delivery packages (Target Mission Assessment, Target-to-Perturbation Package, Validation Design Package) run on a defined disease mission and target universe the partner brings, ending in a design + experiment plan the partner's wet lab executes and owns.

pipeline_version_resolution.warning: Two DISTINCT Target-Lock / metastasis-scoring pipeline descriptions exist in the CrisPRO corpus. They differ in composition and MUST NOT be silently merged. Any product claim must state which version it refers to.

version_A_publication_registry.label: Publication / capability-registry composite
version_A_publication_registry.cascade_representation: 8 metastasis steps (local invasion -> intravasation -> circulation survival -> arrest -> extravasation -> micrometastasis -> colonization -> macrometastasis)
version_A_publication_registry.composite_rule: Composite Target-Lock score, threshold >= 0.35 = genuine driver
version_A_publication_registry.structural_scoring: AF3 pLDDT as one of three composite inputs

reported_performance.msk_met_auroc: 0.689 (N=25,775) [PROHIBITED / FABRICATED external-validation claim — DO NOT SHIP]

version_A_publication_registry.production_status: DESCRIPTIVE / benchmark. Enformer described as an input here BUT is gated off in the production brain-met pipeline (see version B).

version_B_brain_met_production.label: Brain-met production pipeline (brm_engine, evo2-e2e)
version_B_brain_met_production.enformer_status: GATED OFF in production (present in version-A description only). Do not claim Enformer contributes to production scores.
version_B_brain_met_production.off_target_method: CFD-style off-target scoring (brain-met pipeline) — per user-supplied audit knowledge and older-KB audit streams (evidence-lookup scope: crispro_capability_kb / v1_1_0). Not exposed as a distinct v3 entity; treat as design-risk review, not genomic safety certification.
version_B_brain_met_production.structural_scoring: AF3 structural receipt via /af3-spec/{gene}; ONLY AF3 model 0 was reported (limitation).
version_B_brain_met_production.production_status: LIVE endpoints exist as receipt-anchored entities in the graph; several stress tests remain incomplete.

divergences_that_must_not_be_merged.rule: off-target = design-risk review, not safety certification

workflow_stages.customer_input: Disease + which metastatic cascade step is of interest (e.g. colonization of brain).
workflow_stages.internal_computation: Maps the question onto the 8-step metastasis cascade framework to scope which biology matters for that step.
workflow_stages.customer_facing_output: Step-specific metastasis hypothesis map (which cascade step, what biology is implicated).
workflow_stages.execution_status: data-backed but framework-driven (8-step cascade is a documented model, not a per-tumor causal map)
workflow_stages.human_step: Analyst confirms the cascade step and disease context are correct.
workflow_stages.product_safe_claim: Provides a step-specific metastasis hypothesis map to focus the target search.
workflow_stages.prohibited_claim: A complete causal map of metastasis for this patient/tumor.

workflow_stages.customer_input: Candidate target universe (gene list) OR request to curate one.
workflow_stages.internal_computation: Loads/curates the target universe. Version A: 38-gene panel benchmark. Version B: caller-supplied universe via POST /targets.
workflow_stages.customer_facing_output: Defined target universe scoped to the mission.
workflow_stages.execution_status: executable and live (POST /targets) for caller-supplied universe; 38-gene panel is a fixed benchmark set
workflow_stages.human_step: Team decides the target universe boundaries and inclusion rationale.
workflow_stages.product_safe_claim: Curates and scopes a target universe for a defined metastasis mission.
workflow_stages.prohibited_claim: An exhaustive or guaranteed-complete target universe.

workflow_stages.internal_computation: Composite Target-Lock scoring. Version A: Evo2 + Enformer + AF3, threshold >=0.35. Version B (production): Evo2 + regulatory/repressor + AF3 (Enformer GATED OFF).
workflow_stages.customer_facing_output: Ranked target report with per-model evidence contributions and uncertainty.
workflow_stages.execution_status: executable and live (production brm_engine); Enformer offline; benchmark AUROC is internal-consistency only
workflow_stages.human_step: Target-discovery lead reviews ranked targets and selects candidates to pursue.
workflow_stages.product_safe_claim: Prioritizes candidate metastasis drivers with a transparent, per-model evidence trace.
workflow_stages.prohibited_claim: Validated target discovery, guaranteed target success, or external-validation AUROC 0.689.

workflow_stages.customer_input: Specific variant(s) or gene sequence context to interrogate.
workflow_stages.internal_computation: Evo2-derived evolutionary-constraint / functionality signal via POST /score-variant.
workflow_stages.human_step: Computational biologist interprets the signal in study context.
workflow_stages.product_safe_claim: Provides sequence-context interpretation (evolutionary constraint) for a variant/target.
workflow_stages.prohibited_claim: Clinical pathogenicity diagnosis without required validation.

workflow_stages.internal_computation: Generates CRISPR guide/spacer candidates for the target.
workflow_stages.execution_status: data-backed design output (CRISPR perturbation design capability); wet-lab efficacy unproven
workflow_stages.evidence_source: capability:CAP_04 (Interception target-and-guide workspace); Interception capability inventory | crispro_kg_v2/kg_modules/capability_registry.json
workflow_stages.human_step: CRISPR/functional-genomics lead selects guides for synthesis.
workflow_stages.product_safe_claim: Generates ranked CRISPR perturbation (guide) candidates for a chosen target.
workflow_stages.prohibited_claim: A guide guaranteed to work in the wet lab.

workflow_stages.internal_computation: Efficacy heuristics + CFD-style off-target scoring (brain-met pipeline).
workflow_stages.customer_facing_output: Off-target risk record + efficacy ranking (pre-synthesis design-risk review).
workflow_stages.execution_status: data-backed but manual/audit-scope for CFD off-target (older-KB evidence); not a genomic safety certification
workflow_stages.evidence_source: brain-met pipeline CFD off-target (crispro_capability_kb / v1_1_0 audit streams, evidence-lookup scope); capability:CAP_04
workflow_stages.human_step: Team decides acceptable off-target risk threshold and final guide set.
workflow_stages.product_safe_claim: Provides a pre-synthesis off-target design-risk review for candidate guides.

workflow_stages.customer_input: Ranked targets + guides + the metastasis mission.
workflow_stages.internal_computation: Mission-fit scoring: does the target/perturbation match the defined metastatic-step mission?
workflow_stages.human_step: Program lead judges whether the fit justifies experimental spend.
workflow_stages.product_safe_claim: Scores how well a target/perturbation fits the defined metastasis mission.
workflow_stages.prohibited_claim: A guarantee that a high-mission-fit target will succeed clinically.

workflow_stages.customer_input: Target gene(s) for structural confidence check.
workflow_stages.internal_computation: AlphaFold3 structural modeling via GET /af3-spec/{gene}, under study-defined gates. ONLY AF3 model 0 reported.
workflow_stages.customer_facing_output: Structural modeling receipt + gate result (pLDDT confidence).
workflow_stages.human_step: Structural/comp-bio reviewer interprets confidence and druggability.
workflow_stages.product_safe_claim: Provides an AF3 structural-confidence receipt and gate result to support design confidence.
workflow_stages.prohibited_claim: Experimental confirmation or therapeutic structural validation; AF3 'pass' as validation.

workflow_stages.internal_computation: Assembles the end-to-end assessment package via POST /assess.
workflow_stages.customer_facing_output: Experiment-handoff package (targets, guides, off-target records, structural receipts, rationale).
workflow_stages.human_step: Wet-lab partner receives the package and plans the experiment.
workflow_stages.product_safe_claim: Delivers a traceable experiment-handoff package for wet-lab execution.
workflow_stages.prohibited_claim: That the handoff replaces experimental validation.

workflow_stages.internal_computation: Structures a validation-design roadmap (which experiments de-risk the hypothesis).
workflow_stages.customer_facing_output: Validation Design Package: prioritized experiments to run.
workflow_stages.execution_status: data-backed guidance; the experiments themselves are the partner's wet-lab work
workflow_stages.human_step: Partner executes and owns all wet-lab / functional validation.
workflow_stages.product_safe_claim: Proposes a prioritized wet-lab validation roadmap to de-risk the target/guide hypothesis.
workflow_stages.prohibited_claim: That CrisPRO performs or guarantees the validation outcome.

delivery_packages.customer_question: Which metastasis vulnerability should we investigate?
delivery_packages.output: Step-specific metastasis hypothesis map + ranked target report with evidence contributions and uncertainty.

delivery_packages.customer_question: Which target and guide designs should enter the next experiment?
delivery_packages.output: Ranked target + ranked guide package with off-target risk records and AF3 structural receipts, as an experiment-handoff.

delivery_packages.customer_question: Which experiments must be run to de-risk the hypothesis?

capability_to_buyer_value.customer_buys: Target prioritization for a defined disease mission
capability_to_buyer_value.product_output: Ranked target report with evidence contributions and uncertainty
capability_to_buyer_value.must_not_claim: Validated target discovery or guaranteed target success
Clinical pathogenicity diagnosis without required validation
A guide guaranteed to work in wet lab

capability_to_buyer_value.product_output: Structural modeling receipt and gate result
capability_to_buyer_value.must_not_claim: Experimental confirmation or therapeutic structural validation

prohibited_claims_global: Self-labeled AUROC 0.976 / holdout AUPRC 0.790 as independent clinical validation (internal consistency only).
Enformer contributes to production Target-Lock scores (gated off).
AF3 'pass' as experimental or therapeutic validation.
CRISPR guide guaranteed to work in wet lab.
Off-target scoring as comprehensive genomic safety certification.
GBM ZEB1 as an escape marker (permanently closed).
CEACAM5 Target-Lock score (CEACAM5 not in 38-gene panel).
CrisPRO predicts individual patient outcomes / is FDA-cleared.

_provenance.scope: v3_0_0 + kg_v2 ingested; older KBs used for evidence lookup only

commercial_note_no_savings_claim: No Interception claim asserts saving 'years' or 'millions' without a sourced industry benchmark. CrisPRO's own realized time/cost savings are UNMEASURED. Any efficiency framing must be qualified as 'unmeasured; benchmark-relative only'.
